{"name": "run_python", "parameters": {"code": "import datetime
start_date = datetime.datetime(2026, 3, 14)
date_format = '%Y-%m-%d'
end_date_str = '2026-11-09'
def parse_date(date_str):\    year, month, day = map(int, date_str.split('-'))\    return datetime.datetime(year, month, day)
start_date = parse_date(start_date_str)
end_date = parse_date(end_date_str)
days_between_dates = (end_date - start_date).days
print(days_between_dates)"}}

start_date = datetime.datetime(2026, 3, 14)
date_format = '%Y-%m-%d'
end_date_str = '2026-11-09'
def parse_date(date_str):\    year, month, day = map(int, date_str.split('-'))\    return datetime.datetime(year, month, day)
start_date = parse_date(start_date_str)
